transcript: All right. Hey everyone, I'm Umang, founder of Cleopetra. We are building the infrastructure to make emerging assets productive. And what do I mean by productive? I mean assets, your assets earning you money. Millions of tokens are minted on chain on Solana and other blockchains right now and only top 50 of them are earning yield, you can borrow against them, use in DeFi and these kind of use cases on money markets. The rest long tail assets, they are useless. They are dead capital, they are idle capital sitting in your wallet earning nothing. We wanted to solve that. So we built Cleo. The liquidity terminal that allows you to earn yield, earn fees on long tail assets from day one through DEX LPing. We built a very advanced terminal just like Axiom for spot, we built a advanced terminal for LPing on DEXes so our users could earn fees on long tail assets. That went really well. In just five months of private beta, our users did more than 30 million dollars in deposits earning them more than 2 million dollars in fees and us more than 100k dollars in revenue. Now we started with long tail assets. The next big emerging asset category... Oh and we also worked with our founder partners like Oro to help them power yield for their own chain gold token and they earned more than 100k dollars in liquidity in just two weeks through our APIs. And the next big market, the next big emerging category onchain, prediction markets. More than 27 billion dollars in volume this year alone and growing 46% month on month. That brings an opportunity on Solana. When this 700 million dollars in open interest on Polymarket and Kalshi comes on chain, they would want to earn yield. On Kalshi they provide around 3.5 to 4% yield through cash and banking yield but when the token comes on chain it won't be earning anything. And we wanted to solve that with DeFi composability. And that brings an opportunity to solve that with DeFi composability so users can earn more than... much more... around 2.5 to 5% more yields and also unlock more DeFi use cases like borrowing against prediction markets. That's why we are building Cleopetra Earn. A platform where users can earn yield on their prediction market tokens. The architecture is very simple. Multiple traders can stake their yes or no tokens, we do the matching, we redeem the tokens for USDC, earn yield stable coin yields on money markets and users can redeem their token back while having full exposure to prediction markets. Our mission is very simple, just like Jupiter owns trade order flow, we want to own capital flow on DeFi protocols. Our team has been building in Solana for the last three years and we have shipped multiple successful consumer products. Here's my QR code, scan it and let's talk further. Thank you so much.

# Solana Breakpoint 2025: Key Announcements and Stories from Saturday
Day Three maintained the high expectations with announcements from Solflare, Solana Mobile, and Colosseum, among others.
[Pablo](https://solanafloor.com/author/pablo)
Copy link
* Published:
* Edited:
It was said that this year’s Breakpoint would be Solana’s biggest conference yet, and I’m sure none of the several thousand delegates that made their way to the Etihad Arena this week would disagree with that sentiment.
Saturday’s session featured a diverse set of updates highlighting Solana’s continued expansion across hardware, real-world assets, and institutional finance, as well as side events such as Predictify, hosted by[Kalshi](https://x.com/Kalshi?s=20).
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999766576091025438?s=20)> The last day of Breakpoint 2025 delivered a mix of hackathon results, product demonstrations, and strategic commitments that underscored the network’s growing role as a settlement layer for both digital and traditional assets.
Here’s what you missed if you’re not in Abu Dhabi:
## At Breakpoint
1. Colosseum has announced winners for its Cypherpunk hackathon
* *Unruggable, the Solana-native hardware wallet, is crowned grand champion.*
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999765402453467212?s=20)> 1. Uranium Digital demoed their product, which enables institutions to buy Uranium onchain for the first time.
* *Settlement is happening fully on Solana*
* *The entire crypto experience is abstracted*
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999744679441826044?s=20)> 1. RockawayX launches 3 vaults on Solana.
* *Risk-curated RWA vault on Kamino*
* *Additional vaults on Exponent Finance and MidasRWA*
* *Partners with Figure, Onre, Solstice, and Huma as professional curators for these vaults.*
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999753859456204968?s=20)> 1. Solana Mobile is expanding beyond its own devices to additional hardware.
* *Working with FXTech, MediaTek, and Trustonic to integrate the Solana Mobile stack at the chipset level for other Android devices.*
* *MediaTek ships roughly 50% of all Android devices globally.*
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999757725505642967?s=20)> 1. Splyce Finance introduces $SFULC on Solana.
* *$SFULC is a yield-bearing token offering 10% APY powered by Fulcrum Lending*
* *Powered by real cash flows from senior, secured multifamily credit.*
* *$SFULC can be minted with stablecoins or bought directly on Raydium.*
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999761140931526825?s=20)> 1. VC Firm 6th Man Ventures announces that it is focused on Solan

# Jupiter Unveils JupUSD and a New Era of Onchain Finance at Breakpoint
JupUSD anchors Jupiter’s push toward integrated, compliant, and institutional-grade onchain finance on Solana
![Yasmin Werner](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/cropped-cropped-CCIcon-32x32.png)By[Yasmin Werner](https://coincentral.com/author/yasmin/)December 12, 2025**3 Mins Read
![](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/jupiter.jpg "Jupiter Unveils JupUSD and a New Era of Onchain Finance at Breakpoint")
## TLDR
* JupUSD becomes Jupiter’s core stablecoin across swaps, lending, perps, and strategies
* Jupiter Lend exits beta, boosting stablecoin efficiency with higher LTVs and lower penalties
* JupUSD shifts from standalone asset to infrastructure powering Solana-native DeFi
* KRW-pegged stablecoin signals Solana’s growing focus on regulated, institutional finance
* New data, verification, and trading tools support scalable, professional onchain markets
Jupiter announced a coordinated expansion of onchain finance capabilities at Breakpoint, centered on JupUSD and integrated infrastructure upgrades. The update combines stablecoins, lending, data, and trading into a single Solana-native stack. As a result, JupUSD anchors a broader push toward compliant, scalable, and professional onchain finance.
## JupUSD Expands Stablecoin Utility Across Jupiter
[Jupiter](https://coincentral.com/jupiter-targets-full-launch-of-prediction-market-platform-before-2026/)introduced JupUSD as a deeply integrated stablecoin designed to operate across its full product suite. The platform embedded JupUSD into swaps, perpetuals, lending, and automated strategies. Consequently, JupUSD supports consistent liquidity while sharing platform economics with active users.
JupUSD connects stable value with execution layers already processing billions in volume on Solana. Therefore, the design enables protocol-level coordination instead of isolated stablecoin usage. JupUSD also supports rewards during holding periods across multiple onchain features.
The rollout positions JupUSD as infrastructure rather than a standalone asset. Jupiter aligned issuance, routing, and incentives to strengthen onchain activity. As a result, JupUSD appears across web, mobile, and API surfaces as a default settlement asset.
Jupiter paired JupUSD with upgrades to lending and yield systems supporting stable demand. Jupiter Lend exited beta after rapid supply growth and released open source code. This environment allows JupUSD liquidity to move efficiently across borrowing, trading, and structured strategies.
Jupiter Lend uses tick-based liquidity built with Fluid for efficient liquidations. Consequently, the protocol offers higher loan ratios and lower penalties than comparable markets. These conditions

* * * # Jupiter Unveils JupUSD Stablecoin and Major DeFi Upgrades at Solana Breakpoint 2025
Story Highlights
* Jupiter launches JupUSD stablecoin & 8 major upgrades, boosting Solana DeFi with lending, trading tools, rewards & ecosystem safety.
* Solana’s top DEX aggregator Jupiter unveils JupUSD, open-source lending, new Terminal & $1M rewards to fuel DeFi growth.
Jupiter, the top[decentralized exchange](https://coinpedia.org/decentralized-exchange/)(DEX) aggregator on Solana, has unveiled a comprehensive suite of eight major upgrades at Solana Breakpoint 2025, designed to transform the platform into a full-scale DeFi hub. The primary goals of these upgrades are to simplify DeFi, improve safety, and complete Jupiter’s offerings beyond just token swaps.
[Advertisement](https://coinpedia.org/advertising/)[](https://bit.ly/4qIkEoO)
## **JupUSD Brings a Native Stablecoin**
The biggest[announcement](https://x.com/JupiterExchange/status/1999154800982729175?s=20)is JupUSD, a new dollar-backed[stablecoin](https://coinpedia.org/beginners-guide/what-are-stablecoins/)built with Ethena. Unlike most stablecoins that live separately from apps, JupUSD is designed to work directly inside Jupiter’s products. Users will be able to use it while setting up DCA strategies, placing limit orders, and taking part in prediction markets, while also earning rewards. Jupiter believes that owning both the stablecoin and the platform allows funds to move more smoothly across swaps, perpetual trades, and lending. JupUSD is set to launch next week and will tap into the large trading volumes already

tags.impact_reason: Cleopetra's liquidity terminal for long-tail assets and expansion into prediction markets presents a solid update for generating yield within the Solana DeFi ecosystem.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a Pyramid as the anchor because the name 'Cleopetra' evokes ancient Egypt, and a pyramid is a powerful symbol of a vast, dormant store of value—perfectly representing the 'idle capital' of long-tail assets mentioned in the transcript. The concept shows this ancient structure being activated with DeFi technology to unlock its wealth. I included the text 'YES/NO' as glowing, hieroglyph-style engravings to directly represent the core function of monetizing prediction market positions, making the text a diegetic part of this techno-financial structure.
visual_idea.description: A colossal, perfectly smooth pyramid made of polished black obsidian dominates a dark, cavernous space. Intricate, luminous gold circuits, like digital hieroglyphs, trace its surface, pulsing with a soft light symbolizing the flow of yield. Subtly engraved into one of the pyramid's massive faces, the words 'YES' and 'NO' glow with a steady internal golden light, representing the locked value of prediction market positions. The background is filled with a thick, volumetric haze, with faint light from an unseen source catching atmospheric dust, suggesting immense scale and mystery.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A colossal, perfectly smooth pyramid made of highly polished black obsidian dominates a dark, cavernous space, its reflective surfaces subtly mirroring the faint light. Intricate, luminous gold circuits, resembling digital hieroglyphs, trace its surface, pulsing with a soft, warm golden light that symbolizes the flow of yield. Subtly engraved into one of the pyramid's massive faces, the words 'YES' and 'NO' glow with a steady internal golden light, their edges sharply defined against the dark obsidian, representing the locked value of prediction market positions. The background is filled with a thick, volumetric haze, with faint, ethereal light from an unseen source piercing through, creating atmospheric god rays and catching suspended dust, suggesting immense scale and a profound, techno-pharaoh mystery. Composed for a vertical 3:4 aspect ratio, emphasizing monumental height and epic scale, with significant negative space at the top to convey its colossal presence. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, high dynamic range, cinematic lighting, physically based rendering (PBR), ambient occlusion.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a Pyramid as the anchor because the name 'Cleopetra' evokes ancient Egypt, and a pyramid is a powerful symbol of a vast, dormant store of value—perfectly representing the 'idle capital' of long-tail assets mentioned in the transcript. The concept shows this ancient structure being activated with DeFi technology to unlock its wealth. I included the text 'YES/NO' as glowing, hieroglyph-style engravings to directly represent the core function of monetizing prediction market positions, making the text a diegetic part of this techno-financial structure.
visual_idea.description: A macro close-up on the sharp corner of the obsidian pyramid. The shot focuses on the intricate detail where glowing gold circuits meet at a precise geometric angle. The luminous energy pulses visibly within the circuit pathways, reflecting off the flawlessly polished, dark surface of the obsidian. The texture and fusion of ancient material and futuristic technology are the primary focus, conveying precision and high value.

The shot focuses with extreme precision on the intricate detail where glowing gold circuits meet at a precise geometric angle. Luminous, warm amber/gold energy pulses visibly within the circuit pathways, casting subtle neon reflections and a soft, ethereal glow that illuminates the surrounding polished obsidian. The fusion of ancient material and futuristic technology is the primary focus, conveying unparalleled precision and high value, filling the frame with rich texture. Composed for a perfect 1:1 square aspect ratio, emphasizing absolute symmetry and a central, tight macro focus. Atmospheric depth is created by volumetric haze, with subtle fog and volumetric light rays interacting with the luminous elements. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, high dynamic range, cinematic lighting, studio render, realistic materials.

editorial.headline: Cleopetra Unveils Yield Layer for Prediction Markets and Long-Tail Assets
editorial.standfirst: Founder Umang Verma targets the $27 billion prediction market sector with a new protocol designed to monetize idle "Yes/No" positions. The platform aims to become the liquidity backbone for emerging assets, paralleling Jupiter’s dominance in execution.
key_takeaways: Cleopetra generated $2 million in user fees and $30 million in deposits during its five-month private beta.
The new "Cleopetra Earn" product unlocks yield on prediction market tokens, targeting a sector growing 46% month-over-month.
Verma positioned the protocol to "own capital flow" on Solana, mirroring how Jupiter controls order flow.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
At Solana Breakpoint 2025, Cleopetra founder Umang Verma addressed a critical inefficiency in the on-chain economy: the problem of "dead capital." While top-tier assets enjoy robust money markets, the vast majority of tokens—specifically long-tail assets and prediction market positions—sit idle in user wallets. Verma’s solution is **Cleopetra**, a liquidity terminal that has already processed $30 million in deposits during its private beta, generating $2 million in fees for users.

The protocol’s newest expansion, **Cleopetra Earn**, targets the exploding prediction market sector, which Verma cited as having $27 billion in volume this year with 46% month-over-month growth. Currently, when capital moves from platforms like Kalshi (which offers ~4% yield on cash) to on-chain equivalents, that yield evaporates. Cleopetra Earn bridges this gap by allowing traders to stake their "Yes/No" tokens. The system matches these positions, converts the underlying value to USDC, and deploys it into money markets, potentially boosting yields by 2.5% to 5% while maintaining full exposure to the prediction outcome.

Beyond simple yield generation, the architecture introduces DeFi composability to prediction markets, enabling users to borrow against their positions. Verma’s strategic vision is ambitious: he explicitly positioned Cleopetra as the infrastructure layer for "capital flow," drawing a direct parallel to how **Jupiter** has successfully monopolized trade order flow. By partnering with asset issuers like **Oro**—whose on-chain gold token attracted $100,000 in liquidity in just two weeks via Cleopetra’s APIs—the protocol is positioning itself as the primary engine for making emerging assets productive.
